title: Dark Fort Versus BASILISK!
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2qLT-wnFaP0

Daniel (@dungeondive) examines two minimalist dungeon-crawl games related to Mörk Borg: Dark Fort and Basilisk. Dark Fort is a simple roll-and-write game inspired by early Mörk Borg development, while Basilisk is an enhanced version by the creator of Solitary Defilement. Both use the seven-miseries apocalypse system. Basilisk offers significantly more variety through different room types, special encounters, and character abilities while maintaining simple mechanics. The video demonstrates both games being played, showing how Basilisk's added complexity creates more engaging gameplay without sacrificing the rules-light philosophy.

----

Do you prefer simpler dungeon crawlers or those with more mechanical depth?
